home.communityDesc: Stock discussions, analysis together, and real-time market signals from fellow Indonesian retail investors.

badgeInfo.dayTradeDesc: This stock is available for the Day Trade facility — buying shares that can be sold on the same day without full upfront funds.
badgeInfo.tradingLimitDesc: This stock can be used as collateral for the Trading Limit facility — trading credit based on your portfolio value.

notation.title: Special Notations
notation.subtitle: Notations assigned by the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) to this stock.
notation.B: Bankruptcy petition, petition for cancellation of settlement, or in a state of bankruptcy
notation.M: Petition for Suspension of Debt Payment Obligations (PKPU)
notation.E: Most recent financial statements show negative equity
notation.A: Adverse Opinion from the Public Accountant
notation.D: Disclaimer of Opinion from the Public Accountant
notation.L: Listed company has not yet submitted financial statements
notation.S: Most recent financial statements show no operating revenue
notation.C: Legal proceedings against the Listed Company, its subsidiaries and/or members of the Board of Directors and Board of Commissioners with Material impact
notation.Q: Business activity restrictions on the Listed Company and/or its subsidiaries by a regulator
notation.Y: Listed company has not held its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) within 6 months after the end of the fiscal year
notation.F: Administrative sanction and/or written order from OJK for a minor capital market regulation violation
notation.G: Administrative sanction and/or written order from OJK for a moderate capital market regulation violation
notation.V: Administrative sanction and/or written order from OJK for a serious capital market regulation violation
notation.N: Listed company implementing Multiple Voting Shares listed on the Main or Development Board
notation.K: Listed company implementing Multiple Voting Shares listed on the New Economy Board
notation.I: Listed company not implementing Multiple Voting Shares listed on the New Economy Board
notation.X: Listed company listed on the Special Monitoring Board

disclaimer.title: Investment Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: The information presented does not constitute a recommendation or solicitation to buy or sell securities. Investment decisions are entirely the responsibility of the investor. The data displayed is informational and may differ from actual market conditions. Investing in the capital market involves risk. Make sure you understand the risks before investing. Supervised by the Financial Services Authority (OJK).
